description.en: List issues in a GitHub repository. Supports filtering by state (open, closed, all), labels, and assignee.
description.de: Listet Issues in einem GitHub-Repository auf. Unterstützt Filterung nach Status (offen, geschlossen, alle), Labels und Zugewiesenen.
description.es: List issues in a GitHub repository. Supports filtering by state (open, closed, all), labels, and assignee.
description.fr: List issues in a GitHub repository. Supports filtering by state (open, closed, all), labels, and assignee.
description.ro: List issues in a GitHub repository. Supports filtering by state (open, closed, all), labels, and assignee.
description.it: List issues in a GitHub repository. Supports filtering by state (open, closed, all), labels, and assignee.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens

description.en: The owner of the repository (username or organization).
description.es: El propietario del repositorio (nombre de usuario u organización).
description.fr: Le propriétaire du référentiel (nom d'utilisateur ou organisation).
description.ro: Proprietarul depozitului (nume de utilizator sau organizație).
description.it: Il proprietario del repository (nome utente o organizzazione).

description.en: Filter by state: open, closed, or all. Defaults to open.
description.es: Filter by state: open, closed, or all. Defaults to open.
description.fr: Filter by state: open, closed, or all. Defaults to open.
description.ro: Filter by state: open, closed, or all. Defaults to open.
description.it: Filter by state: open, closed, or all. Defaults to open.

description.en: Filter by labels. Separate multiple labels with commas.
description.es: Filter by labels. Separate multiple labels with commas.
description.fr: Filter by labels. Separate multiple labels with commas.
description.ro: Filter by labels. Separate multiple labels with commas.
description.it: Filter by labels. Separate multiple labels with commas.

description.en: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.es: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.fr: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.ro: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.it: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
